description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 58-61.

Level 25

Slayer of Legends

Starting at 25th level, you have become the ultimate slayer, capable of taking down even the most storied foes. When you hit a creature marked by your Slayer’s Mark with a critical hit, you regain 1 Legendary Point. Once you regain a Legendary Point in this way, you cannot do so again until the end of your next turn.

5e. In addition, creatures of CR 20 or higher, or any character of 20th level or higher, count as Favored Enemies for you, even if they are of a creature type you have not chosen as your Favored Enemy.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
